# Camomilla

> Our beloved Django CMS

A powerful and flexible content management system built with Django. Perfect for building dynamic websites and applications.

## Table of Contents

### How to

- [📝 Use Pages](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Pages.md)
- [🌱 Use Page Lifecycle](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Page Lifecycle.md)

- [🧬 Use Structured JSON Field](/camomilla-core/How to/Use StructuredJSONField.md)
- [🗂️ Use Meta Models](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Meta Models.md)
- [🖼️ Use Media](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Media.md)
- [🍜 Use Menu](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Menu.md)
- [🎭 Use Modeltranslation](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Modeltranslation.md)
- [🐝 Use API](/camomilla-core/How to/Use API.md)
- [🚀 Use Astro Integration](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Astro Integration.md)
- [⚙️ Use Settings](/camomilla-core/How to/Use Settings.md)
